title: Hellim's 3D Blocks
description: It adds simple 3D blocks to the game.
body:
![](https://i.imgur.com/KqXOuDj.png) ![](https://i.imgur.com/MTtQrC1.png) ### **Hellim Studios - Hellim's 3D Blocks** Hellim’s 3D Blocks enhances Minecraft’s core building blocks by carefully sculpting them into true three-dimensional forms while preserving their original textures and unmistakable vanilla identity. Focused purely on structural and placeable blocks, this pack adds subtle depth, cleaner definition, and a stronger physical presence without altering colors, style, or the game’s iconic simplicity. The result is a world that feels more solid, refined, and immersive — yet remains instantly recognizable as the Minecraft you know and love.

❗This Resurcepack does not recuire any other things to work.❗

![](https://i.imgur.com/euOoVh8.png)
Blocks
  • Ametamethyst Clusters
  • Beenest
  • Beehive
  • Bookshelf
  • Cake
  • Candels
  • Chains
  • Chiseled Bookshelf
  • Cobweb
  • Copper Bars
  • Copper Bulbs
  • Copper Grates
  • Crying Obsidian
  • Dried Help Block
  • Glowstone
  • Hay Block
  • Iron Bars
  • Ladder
  • Lanterns
  • Lectern
  • Magma Block
  • Pointed Drip Stone
  • Scaffolding
  • Sculk
  • Sculk Catalyst
  • Sea Lantern
  • Shroomlight
  • Soul Lantern
  • Spawner
  • Trial Spawner
  • Vaults

❗You can suggest blocks for us to add to Resourcepack. For this, come to our Discord server or comment.❗

![](https://i.imgur.com/Ol0SK0L.png) * This entire project is licensed under the "All Rights Reserved" license. * You can use the project in Curseforge or Modrinth Modpacks as you wish. You don't need permission for this. But do not forget to tag our project in the description section of your Modpack. * Please send us your problems, bugs, and suggestions regarding the packages via our Discord Server. ![](https://i.imgur.com/1HVar0f.png)
